meaning: n.重击,突然巨响v.发巨响,重击
examples: Suddenly there was a loud bang.
Bang and pop are onomatopoeic words.
'Bang, bang, you're dead!' shouted the little boy.
It was just an accidental bang to my arm but the pain was excruciating.
The Rolling Stones album A Bigger Bang also sold its first one million copies in Europe.
